mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.article_id AS articleId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.comment_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like clu WHERE clu.comment_id = c.comment_id AND clu.user_id = #{userId}) AS liked FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.comment_id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO comment_like(comment_id, user_id) VALUES(#{commentId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, content, article_id) VALUES (#{comment.userId}, #{comment.content}, #{comment.articleId})
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, user_id AS userId, content, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, article_id AS articleId FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
